title: stelis nutans
intro: Stelis nutans, also known as the nutant Stelis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Stelis genus, characterized by its unique, nodding or drooping flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis nutans are said to include its ability to help treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
